mapper.select: SELECT message_id, message_json FROM chat_memory WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_memory (agent_id, message_id, message_json, create_time) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{messageId}, #{messageJson}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_memory WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND message_id = #{messageId}
